name: Maya, Elite Marathon Runner
headline: Faster mental recovery between training blocks
challenge: High-volume training created invisible cognitive fatigue that affected pacing decisions and post-run recovery routines. Maya needed objective signals beyond perceived exertion.
intervention: Integrated Orbit into post-training recovery sessions and pre-long-run mental preparation. Tracked relaxation and HRV-linked recovery scores over an 8-week block.
quote: Recovery isn't just physical. Orbit helped me treat mental reset as seriously as my mileage.
